mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(sum(AMT),0) FROM FIXED WHERE USER_ID = #{id} AND IS_PAID = false
mapper.update:
UPDATE FIXED SET NAME = #{name}, AMT = #{amt}, CTG_ID = #{ctgId},
PMT_DD = NULL, PMT_DD = #{dd},
CARD_ID = #{cardId}, CARD_ID = null,
ACCT_ID = #{acctId}, ACCT_ID = null,
IS_PAID = true, IS_PAID = false,
IS_AUTO_PAY = true, IS_AUTO_PAY = false,
MOD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE FIXED SET IS_PAID = false WHERE IS_PAID = true
mapper.select: SELECT f.ID AS id, f.USER_ID AS userId, f.NAME AS name, CAST(f.AMT AS CHAR) AS amt, CAST(f.CTG_ID AS CHAR) AS ctgId, CAST(f.PMT_DD AS CHAR) AS dd, CAST(f.CARD_ID AS CHAR) AS cardId, CAST(f.ACCT_ID AS CHAR) AS acctId, CAST(e.ID AS CHAR) AS expId FROM FIXED f LEFT JOIN EXP e ON e.FIXED_ID = f.ID AND YEAR(e.PMT_DD) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) AND MONTH(e.PMT_DD) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) WHERE f.IS_AUTO_PAY = true AND f.IS_PAID = false AND f.PMT_DD IS NOT NULL AND ( f.PMT_DD = DAY(CURRENT_DATE) OR ( f.PMT_DD > DAY(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE)) AND DAY(CURRENT_DATE) = DAY(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE)) ) )
